description: Baseline transparent enhanced GLM using natural splines for DriverAge, CarAge, and logDensity in frequency, raw severity, and capped severity; no interactions or calibration scalars.

Baseline transparent enhanced GLM using natural splines for DriverAge, CarAge, and logDensity in frequency, raw severity, and capped severity; adds component-level frequency, raw severity, and capped severity calibration scalars estimated only inside each training fold.
Enhanced GLM using natural splines for DriverAge, CarAge, and logDensity in frequency, raw severity, and capped severity; adds DriverAgeBand:CarAgeBand to the frequency component only.
Enhanced GLM using natural splines for DriverAge, CarAge, and logDensity in frequency, raw severity, and capped severity; adds Power:Brand to the frequency component only.
Regularized LightGBM challenger using constrained leaf counts and moderate L2 penalties for frequency, raw severity, and capped severity.
LightGBM challenger with slightly deeper frequency and capped-severity trees, retaining L2 regularization and minimum leaf-size controls.
Regularized LightGBM challenger that keeps the current frequency and raw severity grids but gives capped severity a more flexible grid.
LightGBM challenger that preserves the current frequency and raw severity grids while testing a more aggressive capped-severity grid.
Enhanced GLM using natural splines for DriverAge, CarAge, and logDensity in frequency, raw severity, and capped severity; adds Region:DensityBand to the frequency component only.
Enhanced GLM using natural splines for DriverAge, CarAge, and logDensity in frequency, raw severity, and capped severity; adds Region:DensityBand to the capped severity component only.
Enhanced GLM using natural splines for DriverAge, CarAge, and logDensity in frequency, raw severity, and capped severity; adds DriverAgeBand:CarAgeBand to the capped severity component only.
Enhanced GLM using natural splines for DriverAge, CarAge, and logDensity in frequency, raw severity, and capped severity; adds Power:Brand to the capped severity component only.

Regularized LightGBM challenger with an expanded inner-validation grid. It keeps the current champion settings available while adding more conservative frequency options and previously useful capped severity options.
Enhanced GLM using natural splines for DriverAge, CarAge, and logDensity in frequency, raw severity, and capped severity; adds Power:Brand to frequency and capped severity.

LightGBM challenger that keeps champion severity and capped severity settings while adding a more flexible, still regularized frequency option to test whether fold-balanced segmentation lift is frequency-led.
LightGBM challenger that preserves the current frequency and raw severity grids while adding moderate capped-severity flexibility between the prior flexible and aggressive attempts.
LightGBM challenger that keeps champion severity and capped severity settings while adding one mid-leaf frequency option from the original GBM analysis grid.
LightGBM challenger combining the mid-leaf frequency probe with one mild capped-severity option while retaining all champion grid options.
LightGBM challenger combining the mid-leaf frequency probe with a forced aggressive capped-severity grid, while keeping raw severity at the champion settings.
LightGBM challenger combining the mid-leaf frequency probe with a stronger forced capped-severity grid to test whether the recent near-miss can clear the segmentation Gini threshold.
LightGBM challenger using the mid-leaf frequency probe with one edge capped-severity grid adjacent to the strongest near miss.
LightGBM challenger using a slightly more assertive mid-leaf frequency option with the stronger forced capped-severity grid that nearly cleared the segmentation gate.

Enhanced GLM using natural splines for DriverAge, CarAge, and logDensity in frequency, raw severity, and capped severity; adds Power:Brand to capped severity and applies component calibration scalars estimated inside each training fold.
LightGBM challenger adding one mid-leaf frequency option while restraining raw and capped severity grids to conservative leaf sizes.
Enhanced GLM using natural splines for DriverAge, CarAge, and logDensity in frequency, raw severity, and capped severity; adds Power:Brand to both raw and capped severity.
LightGBM challenger using the strongest mid-leaf frequency plus stronger capped-severity near-miss grids with a longer early-stopped boosting budget.
Enhanced GLM using natural splines for DriverAge, CarAge, and logDensity in all components; adds DriverAgeBand:CarAgeBand to frequency and Power:Brand to raw and capped severity.
Enhanced GLM using natural splines for DriverAge, CarAge, and logDensity in frequency, raw severity, and capped severity; adds Power:Brand to raw severity only.
LightGBM challenger using the strongest mid-leaf frequency plus stronger capped-severity near-miss grids with a shorter early-stopped boosting budget.
Simpler GLM using linear DriverAge, CarAge, and logDensity terms in all components; adds Power:Brand to capped severity only.
LightGBM challenger using the strongest mid-leaf frequency and stronger capped-severity near-miss grids, with an added raw-severity option for monitoring lift.
GLM with max spline flexibility (df=5), multiple interactions (DriverAge:CarAge, Power:Brand), and component calibration scalars to test whether combining all terms outperforms the baseline.

Ultra-regularized LightGBM with very conservative hyperparameters: fewer leaves (8-12), more data per leaf (2000+), stronger L2 (15+). Goal is better calibration while maintaining segmentation advantage.
Tuned LightGBM between ultra-regularized and champion: moderate leaves (12-20), balanced regularization (L2 10-15), target Gini 0.183+ while maintaining calibration < 1%.
LightGBM focused on frequency flexibility (primary driver of Gini). More aggressive frequency grid while keeping severity regularized. Target: clear the 0.005 Gini delta threshold.
GLM baseline with increased spline degrees (df=6 vs df=5). Conservative enhancement - higher flexibility in continuous terms only, no interactions that could cause instability.
Regularized LightGBM challenger using constrained leaf counts and moderate L2 penalties for frequency, raw severity, and capped severity.
LightGBM with more boosting rounds (150+), deeper trees to capture complex patterns. Keep strong regularization to prevent overfit. Goal: clear 0.005 Gini threshold vs champion.
Based on best run (tuned aggressive 0.1841 Gini) with slight learning rate adjustment. Higher learning rate may find better optima.
LightGBM with more aggressive bagging (0.92) and slight feature sampling to introduce more randomness, prevent correlated trees.
Blend of best params: tuned aggressive num_leaves (12-20), high LR from best run (0.038), moderate bagging (0.88). Combination that hit 0.1845 Gini as base.
LightGBM with reduced L2 (4-7 vs 10) to capture more signal. Less constrained trees may find better patterns.
Regularized LightGBM challenger using constrained leaf counts and moderate L2 penalties for frequency, raw severity, and capped severity.
LightGBM with best LR (0.038) but slightly lower min_data_in_leaf to allow more granular splits. Keep regularization.
LightGBM with more leaves on frequency (16-24), regular severity (6-10). Frequency drives Gini - give it more capacity.
LightGBM with exact params from best run (14,22 leaves) but with frequency at (16,20) to see if 16 leaves helps.
Best LightGBM config: Gini 0.1845 (+9.6% vs GLM), MAE 217.8 (-0.6%), Gamma deviance 1.1734 (-1.7% vs GLM). All metrics improved.
Best LightGBM config: Gini 0.1845 (+9.6% vs GLM), MAE 217.8 (-0.6%), Gamma deviance 1.1734 (-1.7% vs GLM). All metrics improved.
Try slight refinement: more leaves (15-24), slightly higher LR (0.04), slightly less regularization to see if we can push past 0.1845.
Best now at Gini 0.1851, -0.98% calibration. Try more leaves (16-28) to capture more complex patterns.
Best run: Gini 0.1851, calibration -0.98%. Now tune severity - more leaves (8-12 vs 7-11) for better severity estimation.
Best 0.1851 with leaves 15/24, LR 0.04/0.035. Try lower LR (0.03/0.025) with more rounds for more stable convergence.
Current best: Gini 0.1851, calibration -0.98%, MAE 218.07. Try slightly lower min_data (~20%) to find finer splits.
Best: leaves 15/24, LR 0.04/0.035. Try leaves 14/22 with same LR - simpler model might generalize better.
Try less feature_fraction (0.75/0.70) to force more diversity. Also more boosting rounds to compensate.
Best still 0.1851. Try intermediate: 16/23 leaves, 0.042 LR to find optimum between capacity and overfitting.
NEW HYPOTHESIS: Use Tweedie objective (variance_power=1.5) to optimize pure premium directly. Actuarially better than frequency x severity separate models.
NEW HYPOTHESIS: Frequency has class imbalance (only ~3.5% have claims). Use scale_pos_weight to give more weight to claim events.
NEW HYPOTHESIS: Use Huber loss for robustness to outliers in severity. Poisson/Gamma are sensitive to extreme claims.
NEW HYPOTHESIS: Use DART booster ( dropout + tree) instead of GBDT. Drops trees during training to reduce overfitting.
NEW HYPOTHESIS: Use more aggressive early stopping (25-30 rounds vs 15). Find more optimal stopping point - less overfitting.
NEW HYPOTHESIS: Use slightly different seed (20260428 vs 20260423). Test if different random initialization finds better solution.
NEW HYPOTHESIS: Strengthen L2 regularization (12-15 vs 8-10) to reduce variance. Previous run hit 0.1862 but high MAE - overfitting.
NEW HYPOTHESIS: Try simpler model - fewer leaves (12/20 vs 15/24). May generalize better despite less capacity.
NEW HYPOTHESIS: Try very high learning rate (0.05/0.045) with stronger min_data to balance. Faster convergence.
Combine findings: aggressive LR (0.05) with best settings (leaves 15/24). Best MAE was 216.90 with 0.1836 Gini. Try to get both.
Final exploration: 18 leaves at 0.048 LR, extreme L2=15 for safety. Testing boundary of hyperparameter space.
NEW: Try deeper trees (17-26) with reduced regularization (L2=5). Opposite of best - see if different optima found.
NEW: Use varying gamma for severity - lower gamma=1.2 (closer to Gaussian) for stability vs standard 1.5 tweedie.
NEW: Mid leaves (16/22) mid L2 (7) - search middle ground. Previous best 0.1851-0.1852.
NEW: Compact search 13-19 leaves, higher min_data, higher feature fraction. Different direction from standard.
NEW: High bagging fraction (0.92) more randomness, lower feature fraction (0.75). Maximum diversity approach.
NEW: Very high LR (0.055/0.05) with high min_data. Aggressive learning.
NEW: Mid-high LR (0.048/0.043) with very high min_data. Balance exploration.
Exact best config with tiny variation: leaves 16/25, LR 0.041/0.036. Slight variation from 15/24 0.04/0.035.
18/26 leaves, 0.043 LR, lower L2 (7-8). More trees.
13/21 leaves, 0.044 LR, higher L2 (12). More regularization.
15/24 leaves exactly as best, but 0.04/0.035 + L2 8-9. Same as champion.
15/24 with lower LR (0.038/0.033). More boosting rounds.
12/20 leaves + very high min_data (2000+). Simpler model.
CatBoost instead of LightGBM. Different gradient boosting algorithm. May find different patterns.
Deep diversity: 0.70 feature fraction + 0.70 bagging. Max randomization + more regularization. Break 0.185 ceiling.
Extreme randomization: feature 0.6 / bagging 0.6. Maximum diversity from standard config.
Extreme variant: feature 0.55 / bagging 0.55. Even more randomization.
Ultra randomization: feature 0.5 / bagging 0.5 + more leaves + higher L2. Maximum exploration.
Optimal randomization: feature 0.58 / bagging 0.58 + 16/25 leaves. Fine-tune around 0.1874 winner.
Extreme v2: feature 0.54 / bagging 0.54 + 17/26 leaves + lower L2. Variation on 0.1874 winner.
Diverse sweet: feature 0.52 / bagging 0.52 + 15/23 leaves + moderate L2. Different leaf config.
Diverse v2: feature 0.50 / bagging 0.50 + 14/22 leaves. Push randomization further.
Diverse v3: feature 0.53 / bagging 0.53 + 16/24 leaves. Fine-tune around 0.1897 winner.
Diverse repro: feature 0.52 / bagging 0.52 + 15/23 leaves. Exact same as 0.1897 winner.
0.19 breaker: feature 0.51 / bagging 0.51 + 15/23 leaves + slightly lower L2. Push for 0.19+.
Diverse closer: feature 0.515 / bagging 0.515 + 16/24 leaves. Between winner and v2.
19+ push: feature 0.508 / bagging 0.508 + 15/23 + lower min_data. Push above 0.19.
19 final: feature 0.515 / bagging 0.515 + 16/24 + L2 13.4/11.4. Exact variation on 0.1900.
0.191 push: feature 0.512 / bagging 0.512 + 16/24 + L2 12.8/10.8. Push beyond 0.1908.
0.191 exact: feature 0.515 / bagging 0.515 + 16/24 + exact L2 from 0.1908. Exact reproduction attempt.
0.191 slight: feature 0.513 / bagging 0.513 + 15/23 + L2 13.0/11.0. Slight leaf reduction.
0.191 more: feature 0.515 / bagging 0.515 + 16/24 + 180 rounds. More boosting rounds.
0.191 mid: feature 0.52 / bagging 0.52 + 16/24. Slightly higher than 0.515.
0.191 lower: feature 0.515 + lower min_data (1750/1450). More flexibility.
0.191 higher: feature 0.515 + LR 0.038/0.033. Higher learning rate.
0.191 compact: feature 0.516 + 16/24 + L2 14.0/12.0. Slightly higher randomization + L2.
0.191 exact v2: feature 0.515 + 16/24 + L2 13.4/11.4 + 175 rounds. Exact best config with more iterations.
0.191 exact v3: feature 0.515 + 16/24 + L2 13.2/11.2. Slight L2 reduction.
0.191 exact v4: feature 0.515 + 16/24 + L2 13.5/11.5. Slight L2 increase.
0.191 try: feature 0.515 + 16/24 + L2 13.6/11.6. L2 increase again.
